calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Nancy J. Newman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claim Appeals. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
10:50am
John Schmidt appears as respondent. Michael Carrol, Esq., appears for Soka Gakkai International. Also present is David Eisenberg, property manager. There is a discussion with Judge Newman: Soka Gakka International is no longer a party and should be dismissed. (see judgment)
11:00am
Mr. Carrol presents appellant's case.
Mr. Schmidt presents respondent's case in the narrative
11:07am
Judge Newman questions parties
11:20am
Matter is submitted
